# Arcadian Landscape

> Premium landscape design and construction in San Diego and North County, California.

## Business Information
- Owner: Evan Weisman
- License: #978145
- Phone: (858) 617-9038
- Email: evan@arcadianlandscape.com
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Service Area: San Diego County and North County, CA
- BBB Rating: A+
- Experience: 10+ years
- Education: Colorado State University, Landscape Design program

## Services
- Landscape Design
- New Landscape Construction
- Landscape Renovation
- Hardscape Installation
- Patios and Decks
- Paver Installation
- BBQ Island Installation
- Water Features Design
- Landscape Lighting
- Commercial Landscaping
- Irrigation Systems
- Artificial Grass Installation

## Service Areas
- La Jolla, CA
- Encinitas, CA
- Carlsbad, CA
- Del Mar, CA
- Rancho Santa Fe, CA
- Carmel Valley, CA
- Solana Beach, CA
- Cardiff-by-the-Sea, CA

## Specializations
Evan Weisman specializes in sustainable horticulture using native plants and succulents. His design approach treats each landscape as an artistic composition, emphasizing continuity, strategic use of colors, textures, heights, and blooming times. Free initial consultations available for all residential and commercial projects.
